desc: INT_MIN poisons abs, division by -1, and gcd: each has an unrepresentable result (2^63 / -2^63 exceeds the int range, and a literal of that magnitude is mis-evaluated by zsh), so each aborts located and catchable, identically on every shell -- not a wrong/negative value. Normal gcd/lcm still work. Verifies H2.
stdout:
caught abs
caught div
caught gcd
6
12
